actor_claims.quote_text: Montreal, Inc., a Delaware corporation (which we refer to as “Purchaser”)
Pfizer Inc., a Delaware corporation (which we refer to as “Pfizer”)
Medivation, Inc., a Delaware corporation (which we refer to as “Medivation” or the “Company”)

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: Montreal, Inc., or “Purchaser,” a wholly-owned subsidiary of Pfizer Inc., or “Pfizer,”
Montreal, Inc., or “Purchaser,” a wholly-owned subsidiary of Pfizer Inc., or “Pfizer,”
Purchaser is a Delaware corporation that was formed for the sole purpose of making the Offer and completing the process by which Purchaser will be merged with and into Medivation.
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: formed for the sole purpose of making the Offer and completing the process by which Purchaser will be merged with and into Medivation

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: Purchaser will be merged with and into Medivation (which we refer to as the “Merger”)
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: Purchaser will be merged with and into Medivation

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: with Medivation continuing as the surviving corporation (which we refer to as the “Surviving Corporation”) in the Merger and thereby becoming a wholly-owned subsidiary of Pfizer.
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: Medivation becoming a wholly-owned subsidiary of Pfizer as surviving corporation in the Merger

event_claims.description: Pfizer, Purchaser and Medivation entered into the Agreement and Plan of Merger dated August 20, 2016.
event_claims.quote_text: The Offer is being made pursuant to the Agreement and Plan of Merger, dated as of August 20, 2016 (which, as it may be amended from time to time, we refer to as the “Merger Agreement”), by and among Pfizer, Purchaser and Medivation.

event_claims.description: Medivation's board approved execution, delivery and performance of the Merger Agreement and consummation of the Offer and Merger.
event_claims.quote_text: approved the execution, delivery and performance by Medivation of the Merger Agreement and the consummation of the transactions contemplated thereby, including the Offer and the Merger

event_claims.description: Purchaser is to merge with and into Medivation, with Medivation continuing as surviving corporation and becoming a wholly-owned subsidiary of Pfizer.
event_claims.quote_text: Purchaser will be merged with and into Medivation (which we refer to as the “Merger”) without a vote of the stockholders of Medivation in accordance with Section 251(h) of the General Corporation Law of the State of Delaware (which we refer to as the “DGCL”), with Medivation continuing as the surviving corporation (which we refer to as the “Surviving Corporation”) in the Merger and thereby becoming a wholly-owned subsidiary of Pfizer.
